name: dracovish
flavor_texts: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.
Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but this Pokémon can’t breathe unless it’s underwater.
text: Dracovish is the Fossil Pokémon. It is a water and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: water-absorb, strong-jaw, sand-rush (hidden). Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 90, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 75. Evolution line: dracovish. Lore: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction. Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but this Pokémon can’t breathe unless it’s underwater.
